title: CursedASF
description:
a modpack that made minecraft as cursed as possible
play this modpack if u are bored at minecraft, because all of these curseness can cure your boredom and specially depression (proven by me).
body:
# ABOUT

a VERY cursed minecraft modpack to FULLY "curse" your Minecraft experience

Features:
- Cursed world generation
- Flooded nether
- Effects for every mob
- Very annoying and brainrot mobs
- and a lot more, just download and discover it urself

**"WARNING: Playing this modpack with under 1k braincells can cause nausea, heart attack and even death." jk**
